args: set -euo pipefail; UV_BIN="$(command -v uv || true)"; if [ -z "$UV_BIN" ]; then for CANDIDATE in "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" "$HOME/.cargo/bin/uv" "/opt/homebrew/bin/uv" "/usr/local/bin/uv"; do if [ -x "$CANDIDATE" ]; then UV_BIN="$CANDIDATE"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$UV_BIN" ]; then UV_HOME="$HOME/.local"; UV_BIN="$UV_HOME/bin/uv"; curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | env UV_INSTALL_DIR="$UV_HOME" UV_NO_MODIFY_PATH=1 sh; fi; exec "$UV_BIN" run opensearch_orchestrator/mcp_server.py
